## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tavrn and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website issues, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/BfkmSwXoB3BuieFaWF_ZTGhNaQSE5N2-?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Old Tavrn website still live, causing navigation/UX issues; \~15 redirects needed](https://fathom.video/share/BfkmSwXoB3BuieFaWF_ZTGhNaQSE5N2-?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Website redesign in progress; final designs expected end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/BfkmSwXoB3BuieFaWF_ZTGhNaQSE5N2-?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Content strategy progressing well; early positive signals on case analysis content](https://fathom.video/share/BfkmSwXoB3BuieFaWF_ZTGhNaQSE5N2-?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Kellie to review pending articles, particularly malpractice cap topics](https://fathom.video/share/BfkmSwXoB3BuieFaWF_ZTGhNaQSE5N2-?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
